---
title: C.V.
format:
  quarto-cv-pdf: default
author: Lauren E. Price, M.P.P., R.T.S.B.A.
date: last-modified
phone: +1-772-485-2635
# address: "Gallup StrengthsFinder: Input • Learner • Ideation • Strategic • Intellection"
email: Lauren.3.Price@gmail.com
fontsize: 11pt
#fontfamily: ebgaramond-maths # default font LaTeX package https://tug.org/FontCatalogue/about.html
#mainfont: Ubuntu # if you want to use a different locally installed font
# github: pricele2 # github account
web: linkedin.com 
fontawesome: yes
nocite: '@*'
# bibliography: 
#   peer: peer_bib.bib
#   other: other_bib.bib
validate-yaml: false
csl: apa-cv.csl

# https://github.com/orgs/quarto-dev/discussions/1182#discussioncomment-2984986 
# U+2022 	• 	Bullet 	0916
---

<!-- # Summary -->

<!-- Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.  -->

<!-- # Experience  -->
\hrule

## **Houston Independent School District \hfill 2014 - 2025**
*Director, Finance Project Management* \hfill 2025

*Deputy Director (CTM), Data Science & Analytics* \hfill 2021 - 2024
*Senior Analyst, Data Science & Analytics* 

*Grant Manager & Program Analyst, Special Revenue* \hfill 2014 - 2021

- Lorem ipsum sit dolor amet \hfill Summer 2025 

- Project lead for seven-figure agreement with [NASA Johnson Space Center](https://www.nasa.gov/learning-resources-for-educators/); handled contracts, POs, work schedules and IT credentials to connect teachers with curriculum and job-embedded coaching. \hfill 2018-2021

## **PREVIOUS EXPERIENCE**
\hrule
**Metro Nashville Public Schools** \hfill **Nashville, TN**
Summer Associate for Research and Policy \hfill May - July 2014

**Nashville Promise Neighborhood at Martha O'Bryan Center** \hfill Jan 2013 - May 2014
*Practicum Intern* \hfill Jan 2013 - May 2014

Graduate Research Assistant & Program Evaluation Associate, *Vanderbilt University* \hfill 2012-2014

Development Director, *Boys Hope Girls Hope of Colorado* \hfill 2010-2011

Program Associate & Project Coordinator, *Community Resource Center*  \hfill 2008-2010

Project Coordinator, Feasibility Studies \& Capital Campaigns, *Robert B. Sharp Company* \hfill 2007-2008

Program Coordinator & Associate Grants Officer, *El Pomar Foundation* \hfill 2005-2007

## **Education & Credentials**

<!-- \hrule -->

<!-- *DAMA International:* [Certified Data Management Professional (CDMP)](https://dama.org/certification/about-cdmp-certification/) \hfill In Progress -->

<!-- NCES Fellowship in Innovation Science for Education Analytics  \hfill University of Washington, 2025 -->
<!-- https://www.amplifylearn.ai/isea/ -->

Registered Texas School Business Administrator (R.T.S.B.A.) \hfill TX Assoc. of School Business Officials, 2020

<!-- - Coursework concentrations in Payroll, Accounting & Finance, and Federal Grants -->

Master's of Public Policy in Education Policy & Leadership \hfill Vanderbilt University, 3.92 GPA

<!-- - *Parents and Teachers in Title I Schools* [Unpublished master's thesis] -->

Bachelor of Arts, *cum laude* \hfill University of Notre Dame, 3.78 GPA

<!-- - Double major in Theology and Music -->

# Technical Skills
\hrule
**Programming & Data Tools:** R, Python, SQL, Stata, DAX, RStudio/Posit, Rmd, Quarto, LaTeX, Git, GitHub, ETL (Extract, Transform, Load), Relational Databases, Database Administration, Database Systems, Databases, Monte Carlo Simulation Modeling, k-means Clustering, Multivariate Modeling, Machine Learning, Statistical Analysis, Statistics, Econometrics, Large-scale Data Analysis, Data Modeling, Metadata 

**Business Intelligence, Reporting & Visualization:** Power BI, Tableau, ArcGIS, Google Earth, Excel, PowerQuery, Microsoft Excel, Spreadsheets, Reporting Requirements, Presentations

**Enterprise & Administrative Systems:** PowerSchool SIS, SharePoint Administration, PeopleSoft, SAP ERP, Qualtrics, Microsoft Office, Lucidchart, Visio, MS Project, Jira

**Research, Evaluation & Analytics Methodologies:** Randomized Controlled Trials (RCTs), Causal Inference, Cohort Analysis, Continuous Improvement, Forecast Modeling, Program Evaluation, Program Assessment, Primary Research, Logic Models, Data Science, Data Analytics, Data Interpretation, Data Manipulation, Data Strategies, Data Systems

**Financial, Regulatory & Compliance Frameworks:** Federal Grants Management (USDE 84.165A, 84.374A, 84.374B), Education Department General Administrative Regulations (EDGAR) at 2 CFR & 34 CFR, GAAP, GASB, FASRG (Texas), Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act (FERPA) at 34 CFR § 99, Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) at 16 CFR § 312, Privacy Regulations, Legal Requirements, Data Privacy, Data Retention, National Student Data Privacy Agreement (NSDPA)

**Data Governance & Operations:** Data Governance, Data Integrity, Data Management, Quality Assurance, Internal Controls Design, Research Approval Protocols, Compilation

**Leadership & Professional Competencies:** Leadership, Team Management, Project Management, Policy Analysis, Policy Writing, Business Process, Business Insights, Client Relations, Community Impact, Problem Solving, Written Communication, Process Mapping
